comment: "I enjoyed how clear the narrator's voice was, it made it easy to follow along. I also loved the illustrations which helped break the monotony. I am also a fan of the research papers and other additional content provided."
"Scenarios were fantastic in demonstrating positive and negative aspects of video consultations."
"I liked the scenario videos of each patient and caregiver in various fields."
"More courses like this would be great."
"I found the part on zoom fatigue interesting."
